security.csp: default-src 'self' blob:; connect-src 'self' blob: http://127.0.0.1:* ws://127.0.0.1:* https://*.supabase.co wss://*.supabase.co https://*.huggingface.co https:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; frame-src 'self' blob: http://127.0.0.1:* https:

infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: AI Matrx uses your microphone to record audio, transcribe speech locally using Whisper, and to invoke audio-related AI tools. Audio is processed on-device and never uploaded without your explicit action.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: AI Matrx can use your camera to capture images for AI vision tools and document scanning. Captured images are processed locally and are not transmitted externally unless you explicitly invoke a cloud AI tool.
infoPlist.NSScreenCaptureUsageDescription: AI Matrx uses screen recording to capture screenshots for the Screenshot tool and to enable AI-assisted automation workflows. Captured content is only used when you invoke a screenshot or automation tool.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: AI Matrx can read your contacts when you use contact-related AI tools. Contact data is processed locally and is not sent to external servers unless you explicitly invoke a cloud AI tool.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: AI Matrx can read and create calendar events when you use calendar AI tools. Calendar data is processed locally and is not sent to external servers unless you explicitly invoke a cloud AI tool.
infoPlist.NSRemindersUsageDescription: AI Matrx can read and create reminders when you use reminder AI tools. Data is processed locally and is not sent externally unless you explicitly invoke a cloud AI tool.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: AI Matrx can access your photo library when you use image AI tools. Photos are processed locally and are not uploaded unless you explicitly invoke a cloud AI tool.
infoPlist.NSLocationUsageDescription: AI Matrx can access your location when you use location-aware AI tools. Location data is only used for the tool you explicitly invoke and is not stored or transmitted without your consent.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: AI Matrx accesses your location only while the app is in the foreground and only when you invoke a location tool.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: AI Matrx uses Bluetooth to discover nearby devices and report connected Bluetooth hardware when you use the Bluetooth discovery tools.
infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: AI Matrx browses your local network to discover devices and services when you use network discovery AI tools.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: AI Matrx can use Apple's speech recognition for voice-to-text when the local Whisper model is not available.
infoPlist.NSAppleEventsUsageDescription: AI Matrx sends Apple Events to other applications to automate keyboard input, window management, and UI interactions when you invoke automation AI tools.
